module.name: validation
module.spec: ValidateItem checks that an item has a non-empty name (delegated to validate_name), a positive quantity (delegated to validate_quantity), and a non-negative price (delegated to validate_price). Returns nil if all checks pass; returns a ValidationError describing the first failure otherwise.
ValidateName rejects empty strings and strings longer than 100 characters. Returns nil for any string with length 1-100.
ValidateQuantity rejects zero and negative quantities. Returns nil for any integer greater than zero.
ValidatePrice rejects negative prices. Returns nil for any non-negative float64 value, including zero (free items are allowed).
